claim: Claude Code (Artifacts API) has usage limits tied to subscription tier; exceeding limits risks account suspension—track API usage metrics actively.
actionable: Monitor Claude API usage in Anthropic dashboard; set up alerts for 70-80% tier limits to avoid unexpected suspension.
source_title: MAXIMIZE Your Claude Code Subscription (Without Getting BANNED)

claim: Batch processing with Claude API reduces per-token cost significantly—suitable for non-real-time workloads like bulk code analysis or large document RAG.
actionable: For non-urgent work, use Claude Batch API instead of real-time calls to reduce token cost; trade latency for 50%+ savings.
source_title: MAXIMIZE Your Claude Code Subscription (Without Getting BANNED)
